prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（理科组）最低位次分别为 9037→6629→7157→14980→13884，2024 年因云南首年新高考改革出现位次大幅后移（从 7157 跌至 14980），2025 年小幅回升至 13884，近两年波动较大，2025 年基准约 13884 名；该校在云南物理类招生计划 2021 年 39 人、2022 年 40 人、2023 年 42 人、2024 年 45 人、2025 年 58 人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026 年计划 62 人，较 2025 年再扩招 4 人（约 6.9%），扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 暨南大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名近年略有波动（2021 年第 57→2022 年第 47→2023 年第 50→2024 年第 51→2025 年第 55→2026 年第 59），整体处于全国第 50–60 名区间，属中上水平综合类大学；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍安检等校园管理事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 41（较热），综合热度约 99.8 万，关注度中等偏上；历史投档异常记录中未见暨南大学出现断档信号，报考心理较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中，新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A、中国语言文学 A-、应用经济学 A-、生物学 A-、药学 A-，共 6 个 A- 及以上学科，在 211 高校中实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合，推 高报考热度；本省 2026 年高考总人数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年（约 28.57 万）增长约 32.3%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；暨南大学位于广东广州，属一线城市热门地域，对西南省份考生有较强吸引力；该 校在云南招生占比约 2%–3%（2025 年物理类 58 人占全国总计划比例较小），跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 13884、2026 年计划小幅扩招（62 人，+6.9%）、本省考生大幅增加（+32.3%）、工科专业热度持续高企等因素，扩招的缓解作用不足以抵消考生规模激增和地域热度带来的竞争加剧，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约 14509 名，区间 14009–15009 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category (Science Group) minimum rankings: 9037→6629→7157→14980→13884. In 2024, due to Yunnan's first year of new college entrance exam reform, rankings dropped significantly (from 7157 to 14980), with a slight recovery to 13884 in 2025. Recent two years show large fluctuations, with 2025 baseline around 13884. Enrollment plan in Yunnan for Physics Category: 2021: 39, 2022: 40, 2023: 42, 2024: 45, 2025: 58, showing continuous expansion. 2026 plan: 62, an increase of 4 (about 6.9%) from 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 and Double First-Class university. Soft Science main ranking fluctuates slightly in recent years (2021: 57→2022: 47→2023: 50→2024: 51→2025: 55→2026: 59), overall in the national 50–60 range, a mid-to-upper level comprehensive university. 2026 reputation evaluation: neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents like dormitory security checks, no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking: 41 (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 998,000, attention level moderately high. No historical abnormal admission records (e.g., gaps) for Jinan University, indicating stable application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 6 A- or above disciplines: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Applied Economics A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, showing strong strength among 211 universities, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering remain highly recommended, heavily overlapping with the university's Physics Category enrollment, boosting application heat. In 2026, total number of college entrance exam takers in the province is about 377,900, an increase of about 32.3% from 2025 (about 285,700), significantly intensifying competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city with strong appeal to students from southwestern provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2%–3% (2025 Physics Category 58 students account for a small share of national total), making cross-province application relatively hot.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13884, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (62, +6.9%), significant increase in provincial examinees (+32.3%), and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, the mitigating effect of expansion is insufficient to offset the intensified competition from the surge in examinees and regional popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to decline from the 2025 level. Predicted minimum ranking: about 14509, range: 14009–15009.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 14009–15009, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (e.g., Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Accounting) as primary choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Clinical Medicine) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Financial Engineering, Emergency Management) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<14009), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper bound (>15009), prioritize Tier 3 safety options and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (arts/history category) were 2771→1563→1310→1479→2020 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, there was a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing). In 2024, it slightly moved back to 1479, and in 2025, it further moved back to 2020. Competition has eased somewhat in the past two years, with the 2025 baseline around 2020th place. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Yunnan was 26 students in 2021, 23 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 20 in 2025, showing a continuous contraction trend. The 2026 plan is 18 students, a further reduction of 2 students (-10%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been stable in the 50-60 range in recent years (59th in 2026), making it an upper-middle-level comprehensive university with strong liberal arts strengths (Journalism and Communication A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Applied Economics A-). The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 998,000. No signs of admission gaps have been observed in historical admission anomaly records for Jinan University, indicating stable application psychology. Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Applied Economics A-: the strong liberal arts disciplines have strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law (differentiated observation → slightly hot), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), and Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged) is clearly differentiated. Although Jinan University's Journalism and Communication A discipline is strong, it is affected by industry discouragement, which may suppress some application enthusiasm. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in the province is about 377,900, a significant increase from 2025. The scale of history category candidates is expected to increase synchronously, intensifying competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city that strongly attracts liberal arts candidates. The university's enrollment in the liberal arts group in Yunnan is very small (20 history category students in 2025), and cross-province application enthusiasm is relatively high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2020, the 2026 enrollment contraction (18 students, -10%), a significant increase in provincial candidates, and the strong appeal of liberal arts advantageous disciplines, the contraction and increase in candidates jointly drive up competition. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreasing) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1929th, with a range of 1582 to 2276.
